source_test: HEC.FDA.Model/metrics/ScenarioResults.cs (no upstream unit test file exists for this class; oracle-gate-reproduced against the real ScenarioResults/ImpactAreaScenarioResults directly)
note: Phase 6 Task 5. `impact_areas` is a list of entries in EXACTLY the impact_area_scenario_results.json construct/consequence_realizations/aep_observations/stage_observations shape (reused by both the C++ runner's make_impact_area_scenario_results_case and the emitter's MakeImpactAreaScenarioResultsCase) -- one ImpactAreaScenarioResults per entry, add_results'd into a fresh ScenarioResults in construct order. `mean_expected_annual_consequences`/`AddNewConsequenceResultObject` inside each entry always uses ConsequenceType.Damage/RiskType.Total (matching impact_area_scenario_results.json's own convention), so ScenarioResults-level `sample_mean_expected_annual_consequences` is asserted with an EXPLICIT RiskType.Total override (this level's own C# default is RiskType.Fail, which would match none of the built data). `method` dispatches: sample_mean_expected_annual_consequences (args [], ConsequenceType.Damage/RiskType.Total explicit) -- SampleMeanExpectedAnnualConsequences summed across both impact areas via each one's StudyAreaConsequencesBinned.SampleMeanDamage; consequences_distribution_sample_mean (args []) -- GetConsequencesDistribution()'s own defaults (wildcard impact area, ConsequenceType.Damage, RiskType.Total) already match the built data, .SampleMean of the Empirical.StackEmpiricalDistributions(sum) result across both impact areas' consequence histograms; mean_aep (args [impact_area_id, threshold_id]) -- a straight GetResults(impactAreaID).MeanAEP(thresholdID) pass-through, exercising GetResults' lookup-by-ID across the TWO stored impact areas (impact_area_scenario_results.json's own fixture only ever holds one). One ScenarioResults is built and staged per case, shared across every assertion. All values PIN (gate-captured, never hand-derived).
